item.title: タイの地から届けられた物語。 - Vietnam.vn
item.content:encoded:
Keywords: Vietnamese, Ao Dai, overseas residents, entrepreneurs, community

Summary: In a solemn atmosphere, several hundred Vietnamese overseas residents gathered, dressed in traditional Ao Dai. This event celebrated the achievements of successful Vietnamese entrepreneurs living abroad. These individuals have made significant contributions to their communities, often supporting and uplifting fellow countrymen. The gathering highlighted the importance of cultural identity and unity among the Vietnamese diaspora. Attendees shared stories of their entrepreneurial journeys, emphasizing the challenges they faced and the strategies they employed to succeed in foreign markets. This event also served as a networking opportunity, fostering connections among business leaders and aspiring entrepreneurs in the community. The organizers aimed to inspire the younger generation to embrace their heritage while pursuing their dreams, nurturing a sense of pride in their roots. The spirit of cooperation and mutual support was evident, as many attendees expressed a desire to give back to both their local communities and Vietnam. Overall, the gathering was a testament to the resilience and resourcefulness of the Vietnamese diaspora, fostering a sense of belonging and encouraging future generations to thrive while honoring their cultural legacy.
厳粛な雰囲気の中、数百人のベトナム人海外居住者が伝統的なアオザイを身に ... この施設は、成功したベトナム人海外在住実業家であり、常に地域社会 ...

item.title: 年金拠出率を2026年7月からは10％に引き上げ、一部居住者に適用(サウジアラビア) | ビジネス短信
item.content:encoded:
Keywords: pension contribution rate, 2026, residents, JETRO, business news

Summary: Starting from July 2026, the pension contribution rate is set to increase to 10%. This change will apply to certain residents, impacting their retirement savings plans. The adjustment aims to strengthen the pension system and ensure sustainability for future beneficiaries. The announcement comes from JETRO (Japan External Trade Organization), which regularly provides updates on business-related news and policies influencing economic conditions. The rising contribution rate reflects ongoing reforms in the pension framework to address challenges posed by an aging population and financial stability. Stakeholders, including individuals and businesses, will need to adapt to these new regulations. The increase may stimulate discussions on financial planning among residents to prepare for retirement adequately. This shift highlights the government's commitment to enhancing social security measures. Stakeholders are encouraged to stay informed about further developments and implications of these changes for both individuals and the broader economy.
ビジネス短信 ―ジェトロの海外ニュース; 年金拠出率を2026年7月からは10％に引き上げ、一部居住者に適用. ビジネス短信. ビジネス短信のコンテンツ一覧 開く.

item.title: 海外不動産への投資と税金 | 浅田会計事務所（アサダカイケイジムショ）
item.content:encoded:
Keywords: Japanese residents, overseas real estate, rental, sale, taxation

Summary: When Japanese residents rent out or sell overseas real estate, they must consider various taxation implications. First, income generated from overseas property, such as rental income, is typically subject to Japanese income tax. Residents are required to declare this income in their annual tax returns. Second, when selling overseas property, any capital gains realized need to be reported and taxed in Japan. The applicable tax rate may vary based on the holding period of the property and other factors. Additionally, potential foreign taxes may also apply depending on the country where the property is located. To mitigate double taxation, Japanese residents can often utilize tax treaties that exist between Japan and the country of the property. It is crucial for individuals to be aware of both domestic and foreign tax regulations to ensure compliance and optimize their tax positions. Seeking advice from tax professionals with expertise in international real estate transactions can provide valuable guidance in navigating this complex legal landscape. Overall, understanding and fulfilling tax obligations when dealing with overseas properties is essential for Japanese residents engaging in rental or selling activities.
昨日は非居住者が日本の不動産を賃貸・売却した場合でしたが、今日はその逆で居住者が海外の不動産を賃貸・売却した場合を確認します。

item.title: 注意喚起） マサチューセッツ州における竜巻注意報の発令について
item.content:encoded:
Keywords: weather information, safety, tornado, speed, impact

Summary: Residents are urged to pay close attention to the latest weather information to ensure their safety. There is an expectation of localized tornado activity, which can potentially have severe consequences. These tornadoes may reach wind speeds of up to 80 km/h, posing threats to both life and property. It is crucial for individuals to remain vigilant and prepared for sudden changes in weather conditions, which can lead to dangerous situations. Authorities recommend that people stay indoors, secure loose items outdoors, and have emergency plans in place. Regular updates from reliable meteorological sources are essential to remain informed about the evolving weather patterns and any impending threats. Taking these precautions can significantly reduce risks associated with potential tornadoes and other severe weather phenomena. Be proactive in ensuring your safety and that of your loved ones during this period of heightened weather activity.
在留邦人の皆様におかれましては、最新の気象情報に注意し、安全確保に努めてください。 ２ 予想される気象影響局地的な竜巻（Tornado）の発生最大時速80 ...

item.title: （続報）米国宛て郵便物の引受再開に関するお知らせ | 日本郵便株式会社
item.content:encoded:
e転居, 不在時, 受け取り, 置き配, 郵便局アプリ

Summary: e転居 is a service that enhances the convenience of receiving packages when you are not at home. It provides options like "oku-hai" (置き配), allowing for deliveries to be left at your doorstep or in designated safe spaces. Additionally, packages can be collected from lockers such as はこぽす (hakoposu) located at train stations, making it easier for those who may not be home to receive their deliveries. The service is integrated with the Postal Service’s app, enabling users to manage their deliveries efficiently, track their packages, and make adjustments as needed. Furthermore, users can purchase shipping-related products, including gifts and goods, through this platform. By utilizing features such as ゆうID (Yu-ID), the service aims to streamline the entire process of sending and receiving packages, ensuring that users have a hassle-free experience. Overall, e転居 provides a modern solution to the challenges of package delivery, catering to the needs of busy individuals who may often be away from home.
e転居. 不在時の受け取りを便利に. 置き配 · はこぽす駅などのロッカーから荷物 ... e転居 · 郵便局アプリ · ゆうID. 送るための商品を買う ギフト・グッズなど ...

item.title: TRX/ETH【TRXETH.FTASB】株価掲示板｜投資家のコメント - moomoo証券
item.content:encoded:
Keywords: TRX, ETH, insider trading, money laundering, complaints

Summary: The bulletin for TRX/ETH discusses various important topics related to trading practices. It highlights concerns surrounding unfair trading activities that can impact market integrity. The section on insider trading registration emphasizes the importance of transparency and accountability among individuals with access to non-public information, ensuring a level playing field for all market participants. Additionally, the article addresses the implementation of the Anti-Money Laundering Act, which aims to prevent the transfer of criminal proceeds and promote ethical financial practices. This law requires adherence to strict regulations and reporting obligations for parties involved in cryptocurrency transactions. Finally, the bulletin provides a channel for the submission of opinions, grievances, and complaints, inviting stakeholders to voice their concerns and contribute to the enhancement of the trading environment. Overall, the information conveyed in the bulletin stresses the necessity of fair practices, transparency, and compliance with legal frameworks to maintain trust and stability in the cryptocurrency market.
TRX/ETH【TRXETH.FTASB】掲示板 · 不公正取引について · インサイダー（内部者）登録について · 犯罪収益移転防止法の施行について · ご意見・苦情の申立てについて.

item.title: 金融庁と関東財務局、moomoo証券に一部業務停止命令 「NISA対象」虚偽説明
item.content:encoded:
Keywords: crime revenue transfer prevention law, cyber security measures, false explanation, securities transaction monitoring commission, moomoo securities

Summary: The article discusses the identification of potential violations of the crime revenue transfer prevention law in relation to moomoo securities. It highlights that there were shortcomings found in their cyber security measures, which raised concerns about the protection of sensitive information. Additionally, the company was implicated in providing false explanations regarding its practices, which caught the attention of regulatory authorities. The securities transaction monitoring commission has taken an interest in these developments, emphasizing the need for compliance with legal standards and transparent communication. As regulatory scrutiny increases, moomoo securities must address these issues to restore trust and ensure adherence to industry regulations. The findings suggest a pressing need for the company to strengthen its cyber security protocols and maintain accurate reporting to avoid legal repercussions and protect investor interests. Overall, this situation serves as a reminder for financial institutions to prioritize compliance and transparency to mitigate risks associated with both cyber security breaches and legal violations.
... 犯罪収益移転防止法に違反する可能性があると認定。サイバーセキュリティー対策にも不備が見つかった。 moomoo証券による虚偽説明は、証券取引等監視委員会 ...

item.title: ELF/ETH【ELFETH.FTASB】株価掲示板｜投資家のコメント - moomoo証券
item.content:encoded:
Keywords: ELF/ETH, unfair trading, insider registration, anti-money laundering, complaints

Summary: The ELF/ETH board discusses various critical topics concerning trading practices and regulatory compliance. One focus is on unfair trading, highlighting the need for transparency and fairness in the market to protect investors' interests. Another important aspect is insider registration, which aims to prevent individuals with access to non-public information from exploiting it for personal gain. This is crucial for maintaining the integrity of the trading environment. Additionally, the article addresses the implementation of the Anti-Money Laundering (AML) Act, which is designed to prevent the transfer of criminal proceeds and ensure that trading activities comply with legal standards. This legislation reinforces the commitment to eradicating illicit financial activities within the crypto space. Lastly, the board encourages participants to voice their opinions and file complaints regarding any concerns they may have about trading practices or the operational aspects of the platform. All these elements reflect a comprehensive approach to fostering a safe and equitable trading atmosphere in the ELF/ETH marketplace.
ELF/ETH【ELFETH.FTASB】掲示板 · 不公正取引について · インサイダー（内部者）登録について · 犯罪収益移転防止法の施行について · ご意見・苦情の申立てについて.

item.title: THETA/ETH【THETAETH.FTASB】株価掲示板｜投資家のコメント - moomoo証券
item.content:encoded:
Keywords: THETA, ETH, insider trading, financial regulations, complaints

Summary: The THETA/ETH discussion board addresses various critical aspects of trading and regulations in the digital currency market. One key topic is the issue of unfair trading practices that can undermine market integrity. Additionally, there is a focus on insider trading, which refers to the buying or selling of assets based on non-public information, raising concerns about transparency and fairness in the marketplace. The board also discusses the implementation of the Act on Prevention of Transfer of Criminal Proceeds, which aims to combat money laundering and ensure that the financial system is not misused for illegal activities. This regulation is particularly relevant in the context of cryptocurrency, where anonymity and rapid transactions can pose challenges for law enforcement. Lastly, the platform encourages users to voice their opinions and submit complaints regarding any issues they encounter, which fosters a community atmosphere where all participants can engage constructively and work towards enhancing the integrity and reliability of the trading environment. Through these discussions, the board aims to create a more informed and equitable trading landscape for THETA and ETH investors.
THETA/ETH【THETAETH.FTASB】掲示板 · 不公正取引について · インサイダー（内部者）登録について · 犯罪収益移転防止法の施行について · ご意見・苦情の申立て ...

item.title: SC/ETH【SCETH.FTASB】株価掲示板｜投資家のコメント - moomoo証券
item.content:encoded:
Keywords: SC/ETH, insider trading, unfair trading, crime profits, complaints

Summary: The SC/ETH discussion board addresses several important topics related to financial regulations. Firstly, it highlights issues concerning unfair trading practices, which can distort market integrity. This includes the problematic nature of insider trading, where individuals leverage non-public information for personal gain, undermining fairness in financial markets. Additionally, the board delves into the registration of insiders, emphasizing the need for transparency and accountability among those privy to sensitive corporate information. Furthermore, the article discusses the implementation of the Anti-Money Laundering Act, which aims to prevent the transfer of criminal proceeds and ensure that financial transactions uphold integrity. Compliance with this law is crucial for maintaining the trust of investors and the overall stability of the financial system. Lastly, the platform encourages users to voice their opinions or file complaints regarding any practices they deem unjust, thus fostering an environment where concerns can be appropriately addressed. Overall, the discussion board serves as a vital resource for raising awareness and promoting ethical conduct in financial dealings.
SC/ETH【SCETH.FTASB】掲示板 · 不公正取引について · インサイダー（内部者）登録について · 犯罪収益移転防止法の施行について · ご意見・苦情の申立てについて.
